name: app.R
content:
library(shiny) library(ggplot2) library(dplyr) # --------------------------------------------------------- # 0. 讀取資料與預處理 # --------------------------------------------------------- # 請確保路徑正確或檔案在同資料夾 load("E:/2_lab/Ku12_TaiwanTreeHeightTolerant/Output_dt/DHdt_All.Rdata") load("E:/2_lab/Ku12_TaiwanTreeHeightTolerant/Output_dt/ultimate_master_table.Rdata") clean_text_data <- function(df) { df %>% mutate( # 安全地轉為字串 across(any_of(c("ForestType", "LifeForm2", "TolerantSPtype")), as.character), # 加上 is.na() 判斷，確保原本是 NA 的維持 NA，不會被洗壞 ForestType = ifelse(is.na(ForestType), NA, ifelse(trimws(ForestType) == "Natural Forest", "Primary", trimws(ForestType))), LifeForm2 = ifelse(is.na(LifeForm2), NA, case_when( tolower(trimws(LifeForm2)) == "trees" ~ "Trees", tolower(trimws(LifeForm2)) == "shrub" ~ "shrub", TRUE ~ trimws(LifeForm2) )), TolerantSPtype = ifelse(is.na(TolerantSPtype), NA, tolower(trimws(TolerantSPtype))) ) } DHdt_All <- clean_text_data(DHdt_All) ultimate_master_table <- clean_text_data(ultimate_master_table) # 計算徑級上限 (🌟 確保過濾掉含有 NA 的幽靈群組) m5_limits <- DHdt_All %>% filter(!is.na(ForestType) & !is.na(LifeForm2) & !is.na(TolerantSPtype)) %>% group_by(ForestType, LifeForm2, TolerantSPtype) %>% summarize(max_dbh_group = max(DBH, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") global_max_dbh <- max(DHdt_All$DBH, na.rm = TRUE) ultimate_master_table <- ultimate_master_table %>% left_join(m5_limits, by = c("ForestType", "LifeForm2", "TolerantSPtype")) %>% mutate(max_dbh_limit = ifelse(Model == "M5", max_dbh_group, global_max_dbh)) %>% select(-max_dbh_group) # --------------------------------------------------------- # 1. 使用者介面 (UI) - 三欄位架構 (左:輸入 | 中:圖表 | 右:紀錄) # --------------------------------------------------------- ui <- fluidPage( title = "Tai-H App | 臺灣樹高預測", # 歡迎首頁 conditionalPanel( condition = "input.enter_app == 0", div(style = "display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 90vh; text-align: center; background-color: #2b2b2b; color: #a9b7c6; border-radius: 15px;", pre(style = "font-size: 18px; color: #cc7832; font-weight: bold; border: none; background: none;", " /\\_/\\ \n ( o.o ) 旦~\n > ^ <"), h1("Tai-H App", style = "color: #6a8759;"), h3("臺灣樹高預測系統", style = "color: #9876aa;"), actionButton("enter_app", "進入預測系統", class = "btn-lg btn-success") ) ), # 主程式介面 conditionalPanel( condition = "input.enter_app > 0", fluidRow( column(12, titlePanel("Tai-H: 推估臺灣闊葉林樹木之樹高"), hr()) ), fluidRow( # === 第一欄：左側資料選擇 (寬度 3) === column(3, div(style = "padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px; background-color: #ffffff;", h4("模型參數設定"), numericInput("dbh", "輸入胸徑 DBH (cm):", value = 20, min = 1, max = 300), selectInput("model", "選擇預測模型:", choices = c("M1: 基礎公式" = "M1", "M2: 隨機樣區" = "M2", "M3: 隨機物種" = "M3", "M4: 隨機巢狀層級" = "M4", "M5: 功能群全模型" = "M5")), # 🌟 關鍵修復：使用 na.omit() 徹底排除選項中的 NA conditionalPanel( condition = "input.model == 'M5'", selectInput("forest", "森林類型:", choices = unique(na.omit(ultimate_master_table$ForestType))), selectInput("lifeform", "生活型:", choices = unique(na.omit(ultimate_master_table$LifeForm2))), selectInput("tolerance", "耐陰性:", choices = unique(na.omit(ultimate_master_table$TolerantSPtype))) ), hr(), actionButton("save_btn", "確定紀錄數據", class = "btn-block btn-success"), actionButton("clear_btn", "清除所有紀錄", class = "btn-block btn-danger"), hr(), uiOutput("download_ui"), hr(), helpText(HTML("1. 本工具基於 Weibull 公式: H = 1.3 + a * (1 - exp(-c * DBH^b))
2. 本工具資料發展的 DBH有最大值，請注意資料備註內的警告")) ) ), # === 第二欄：中間預測結果與圖表 (寬度 5) === column(5, div(style = "padding: 15px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px; background-color: #ffffff;", h3(textOutput("pred_h")), h5(textOutput("interval_info"), style="color: #666;"), hr(), plotOutput("curve_plot", height = "500px") ) ), # === 第三欄：右側資料紀錄表 (寬度 4) === column(4, h4("數據紀錄歷史"), # 加上橫向捲軸 div(style = "overflow-x: auto; background-color: #ffffff; padding: 5px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 5px;", tableOutput("record_table")) ) ) ) ) # --------------------------------------------------------- # 3. 後端邏輯 (Server) # --------------------------------------------------------- server <- function(input, output, session) { # --------------------------------------------------------- # A. 初始化儲存空間 (紀錄表格) - 增加「預測誤差」欄位 # --------------------------------------------------------- storage <- reactiveVal(data.frame( 序號 = integer(), 模型 = character(), 條件 = character(), DBH_cm = numeric(), 預測樹高_m = numeric(), 預測誤差 = numeric(), # 🌟 新增欄位 備註 = character(), # 🌟 新增備註 stringsAsFactors = FALSE )) # --------------------------------------------------------- # B. 核心反應邏輯：從 Ultimate 大表提取參數 (維持不變) # --------------------------------------------------------- target_row <- reactive({ req(input$model) if (input$model == "M5") { res <- ultimate_master_table %>% filter(Model == "M5", ForestType == input$forest, LifeForm2 == input$lifeform, TolerantSPtype == input$tolerance) %>% slice(1) } else { res <- ultimate_master_table %>% filter(Model == input$model) %>% slice(1) } return(res) }) # --------------------------------------------------------- # C. 背景散佈點過濾邏輯 (維持不變) # --------------------------------------------------------- bg_points <- reactive({ req(input$model) if (input$model == "M5") { req(input$forest, input$lifeform, input$tolerance) pts <- DHdt_All %>% filter(ForestType == input$forest, LifeForm2 == input$lifeform, TolerantSPtype == input$tolerance) } else { pts <- DHdt_All } return(pts) }) # --------------------------------------------------------- # D. 計算即時預測值與區間 (維持不變) # --------------------------------------------------------- calc_res <- reactive({ row <- target_row() if(nrow(row) == 0) return(NULL) pred <- 1.3 + row$a_fixed * (1 - exp(-row$c_fixed * (input$dbh ^ row$b_fixed))) margin <- 1.96 * (row$sigma * (input$dbh ^ row$varStruct)) list(pred = pred, margin = margin, max_limit = row$max_dbh_limit) }) # --------------------------------------------------------- # E. UI 文字輸出 # --------------------------------------------------------- output$pred_h <- renderText({ res <- calc_res() if(is.null(res)) return("⚠️ 大表中查無此組合參數") paste0("即時預測樹高: ", round(res$pred, 2), " 公尺") }) output$interval_info <- renderText({ res <- calc_res() if(is.null(res)) return(NULL) paste0("95% 預測誤差範圍: ±", round(res$margin, 2), " m") }) # --------------------------------------------------------- # F. 繪圖邏輯 (維持不變) # --------------------------------------------------------- output$curve_plot <- renderPlot({ row <- target_row() res <- calc_res() pts <- bg_points() validate(need(nrow(row) > 0, "⚠️ 參數大表中找不到對應的模型係數。")) dbh_seq <- seq(1, 150, length.out = 300) pred_seq <- 1.3 + row$a_fixed * (1 - exp(-row$c_fixed * (dbh_seq ^ row$b_fixed))) sd_seq <- row$sigma * (dbh_seq ^ row$varStruct) df_curve <- data.frame( DBH = dbh_seq, H_pred = pred_seq, H_low = pred_seq - (1.96 * sd_seq), H_high = pred_seq + (1.96 * sd_seq) ) p <- ggplot() if(nrow(pts) > 0) { p <- p + geom_point(data = pts, aes(x = DBH, y = H), color = "gray60", alpha = 0.4, size = 1) } p + geom_ribbon(data = df_curve, aes(x = DBH, ymin = H_low, ymax = H_high), fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.2) + geom_line(data = df_curve, aes(x = DBH, y = H_pred), color = "darkblue", size = 1.2) + annotate("point", x = input$dbh, y = res$pred, color = "red", size = 4) + scale_x_log10() + labs(title = paste("模型軌跡與誤差分析:", input$model), subtitle = if(input$model=="M5") paste("條件:", input$forest, "/", input$lifeform, "/", input$tolerance, "(N:", nrow(pts), ")") else paste("全域模型 (N:", nrow(pts), ")"), x = "DBH (cm)", y = "Height (m)") + theme_bw(base_size = 14) + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 45)) }) # --------------------------------------------------------- # G. 按鈕動作：紀錄數據 - 這裡加入「預測誤差」到表格中 # --------------------------------------------------------- observeEvent(input$save_btn, { res <- calc_res(); req(res) cond_str <- if(input$model=="M5") paste(input$forest, input$lifeform, input$tolerance, sep="-") else "-" remark_text <- if(input$dbh > res$max_limit) { "已不在模型發展的資料範圍內，小心服用" } else { "" } new_entry <- data.frame( 序號 = nrow(storage()) + 1, 模型 = input$model, 條件 = cond_str, DBH_cm = input$dbh, 預測樹高_m = round(res$pred, 2), 預測誤差 = round(res$margin, 2), # 🌟 這裡把誤差放進去 備註 = remark_text, # 🌟 加入備註 stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) storage(rbind(storage(), new_entry)) }) # 清除紀錄 observeEvent(input$clear_btn, { storage(storage()[0, ]) }) # 顯示紀錄表格 output$record_table <- renderTable({ storage() }) # --------------------------------------------------------- # H. CSV 下載按鈕 - 增加表頭的「預測誤差」 # --------------------------------------------------------- output$download_ui <- renderUI({ df <- storage() if (nrow(df) == 0) return(tags$button(class = "btn btn-secondary btn-block", disabled = NA, "匯出 CSV (無紀錄)")) # 增加表頭欄位「預測誤差」 csv_str <- paste0("序號,模型,條件,DBH_cm,預測樹高_m,預測誤差\n", paste(apply(df, 1, paste, collapse = ","), collapse = "\n")) data_uri <- paste0("data:text/csv;charset=utf-8,%EF%BB%BF", URLencode(csv_str, reserved = TRUE)) tags$a(href = data_uri, download = paste0("TaiH_Output_", Sys.Date(), ".csv"), class = "btn btn-info btn-block", "匯出紀錄為 CSV") }) } shinyApp(ui, server)
